Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}You come here a lot, don'tcha? You shouldn't rely so much on medicine, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}You're still young. You should build strength by exercising, eating well, and doing schoolwork.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}Don't worry obsessively over your health. That's the doctor's job. Haha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16603 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}Oh, you... I think I've seen you come here a couple times.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}You're still young, so you shouldn't rely so much on medicine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}You can live a healthy life without the need for medicine if you exercise, eat well, and study hard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}That's fine and all, but you're young; you should try not to rely on medicine too much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1087 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 21 1 151}You can live a healthy life without the need for medicine if you exercise, eat well, and study hard.[n]{f 1 1}
